name: governance-command
title: Data Governance Command Center
subtitle: coverage, ownership & policy health at a glance
description: A governance showcase — a coverage gauge, a multi-dimension health radar, a domain×policy coverage heatmap, and ownership/classification breakdowns.

dataAccesses.name: GovKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN governed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS governed_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT policy_key) AS policies, COUNT(DISTINCT term_key) AS terms, COUNT(DISTINCT owner) AS owners FROM v_entities_master

dataAccesses.name: Coverage
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN governed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS governed_pct FROM v_entities_master

dataAccesses.name: HealthByDimension
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT dimension, ROUND(AVG(score),0) AS score FROM v_governance_scorecard GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: DomainPolicyGrid
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT domain, policy_type AS policy, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN covered THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),0) AS coverage FROM v_domain_policy GROUP BY 1,2

dataAccesses.name: AssetsByOwner
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT owner, COUNT(*) AS assets FROM v_entities_master GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 8

dataAccesses.name: BySensitivity
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sensitivity, COUNT(*) AS assets FROM v_entities_master GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

kpis.label: Governed
kpis.info: Share of catalog entities under active governance.

kpis.label: Active Policies
kpis.info: Distinct policies applied across the catalog.

kpis.label: Glossary Terms
kpis.info: Business glossary terms linked to data.

panels.title: Governance Coverage
panels.info: Overall share of the catalog under governance.

panels.title: Governance Health by Dimension
panels.info: Maturity score across the core governance dimensions.

panels.title: Policy Coverage by Domain
panels.info: Where policy coverage is strong — and where the gaps are.

panels.title: Assets by Owner
panels.info: Ownership concentration across the top data owners.
